root_cause: Database connection pool exhaustion under peak load
resolution: Increased pool size from 20 to 50 and added connection monitoring

root_cause: Memory leak in order validation module
resolution: Patched validation logic and added memory usage monitoring

root_cause: SSL certificate approaching expiry triggered alert
resolution: Renewed certificate and implemented auto-renewal via ACM

root_cause: JWT signing key rotation script failed silently
resolution: Fixed rotation script and added pre-rotation validation step and alert on failure

root_cause: Circuit breaker stuck open after upstream bank API timeout cascade
resolution: Manual circuit breaker reset and added fallback routing to secondary bank and implemented health check ping

root_cause: Model drift — false positive rate spiked from 2% to 15%
resolution: Retrained model with Feb-Mar data and adjusted decision threshold from 0.7 to 0.75

root_cause: SQS dead letter queue overflow — 50k+ unprocessable messages
resolution: Increased DLQ retention to 14 days and added CloudWatch alarm at 10k messages and deployed consumer fix

root_cause: ETL pipeline timeout — daily report query exceeded 30-min limit on grown dataset
resolution: Optimized Redshift query with sort keys and added pagination for large result sets
